name: Glass Vacuum Container 1520ml with handpump
short_description: Imagine your fresh leftovers or marinated garden vegetables vacuum-sealed in crystal-clear glass for ultimate freshness. Our G-Line container transitions seamlessly from freezer to oven, with a manual handpump included for quick sealing anywhere in your kitchen.
description:
The LAVA G-Line Glass Vacuum Container offers the ultimate in versatile food storage. Made from high-quality borosilicate glass, it is heat-resistant, freezer safe, and dishwasher safe.

  • Sustainable: Reduce plastic waste by using reusable glass.
  • Heat Resistant: Oven and microwave safe (without lid).
  • Complete Set: Includes a manual handpump for convenience.

name: Vacuum Sealer attachment for Glass Jars 8-9cm diameter
short_description: Experience the satisfaction of preserving your home-made jams and pickles directly in their original jars. Reduce plastic waste and keep your pantry organized with our specialized attachment that turns standard glass jars into airtight vacuum storage vaults.
description:
The LAVA Glass Jar Sealer is a revolutionary attachment that allows you to vacuum seal standard commercial jars (8-9cm diameter). Perfect for preserves, dry goods, and bulk pantry storage.

  • Zero Waste: Reuse your glass jars indefinitely.
  • Professional Preservation: Extracts air to prevent oxidation and spoilage.
  • Universal fit: Works with all LAVA vacuum machines.
